title: Super Efficient Graphite Dry Cell Hydrogen Generator
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
The paper i reffered to is A systematic study on electroyltic production of hydrogen gas by using graphite as an electrode  - DOI 10.1590/51516-14392013005000153
You can also buy my books and materials for your own experiments from our webshop at https://secure.workingink.co.uk/working-ink-shop/
